title: plantago australis subsp. oreades
intro: Plantago australis subsp. oreades, also known as the mountain plantain, is a subspecies of the Plantago australis plant, a type of flowering plant in the plantain family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of mountain plantain include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
